description_long: This house features a sprawling, single-story layout with a partial second story, set on a rectangular lot with a driveway and a grassy yard. The exterior combines brick and light-colored siding, with a prominent dark roof that includes both flat and gently sloped sections. Tall, leafless trees line the front yard, adding vertical interest and a sense of privacy. The driveway leads to a garage attached to the main structure, and a red car is parked near the entrance. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is set back from the street, accessible via a paved walkway, and is accentuated by a small porch area.
description: A modern, multi-level house with brick and siding exterior, dark roof, attached garage, and a landscaped yard with tall trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, walkway, tall trees, and a red car parked near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached garage, driveway, and the long, low profile of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with large windows and an expansive grassy yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entrance, more trees, and the rear portion of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a small porch, paved walkway, and minimal decorative elements
